keywords.job: I am a sorcerer. I was sent here by the academy of Edron to function as an adviser in magical matters and as a teacher for sorcerers in need of training.
keywords.name: Myra is my name.
keywords.king: We are here on the behalf of the king and try our best to make this colony prosper.
keywords.venore: I find the Venoran activity here disturbing, but, after all, that's not my business.
keywords.thais: Thais lacks the lovely peace of Edron, but as the capital of the Thaian kingdom it offers more chances to study or entertain yourself than this fledgling city.
keywords.carlin: The druids of Carlin could do a lot with all the freedom they have, but they waste their resources in some strange cult and lack any scientific approach to magic.
keywords.edron: I loved my time at the academy. I had my differences with some superiors though, and when it came to select somebody to come here, my name was mentioned once too often I think.
keywords.jungle: I am working on a spell aiming specifically on destroying plant life. I am sure it would be of enormous help and would earn me a positon in the academy once more.
keywords.tibia: I have already seen more of the world as I had ever planned.
keywords.kazordoon: I would have even preferred an appointment to the dark halls of Kazordoon than to this colony.
keywords.dwarves: Dwarves are good miners, I can't say much more about them.
keywords.dwarfs: Dwarves are good miners, I can't say much more about them.
keywords.ab\u0027dendriel: Elves would probably be more suitable to this environment.
keywords.elves: Elves would probably be more suitable to this environment.
keywords.elfs: Elves would probably be more suitable to this environment.
keywords.darama: I think all this talk about the conquest of a new continent is simply exaggerated.
keywords.darashia: Living in the desert must be even worse than living here.
keywords.ankrahmun: Although I'd love to study the undeath more closely, I'd not want to study it first hand.
keywords.ferumbras: He wastes all his power to spread terror and destruction. Doesn't this become boring after a while?
keywords.excalibug: The magic used to create that weapon would be more interesting than the weapon itself.
keywords.apes: They are annoying but easily driven away.
keywords.lizard: The lizards are somewhat mysterious, but who would care to travel through the whole cursed jungle to learn the boring secrets of some fly-eaters?
keywords.dworcs: Sooner or later we will have to face this threat in the south.
keywords.vocation: Your vocation is your profession. There are four vocations in Tibia: Sorcerers, paladins, knights, and druids.
keywords.rune: Each spell, that starts with 'Ad', needs a rune. You have to hold a blank rune in one of your hands when you cast it. You can buy runes at the magic shop.
keywords.spell: Sorry, I only sell spells to Sorcerers.

texts: I am a sorcerer. I was sent here by the academy of Edron to function as an adviser in magical matters and as a teacher for sorcerers in need of training.

entries.response: I sell attack rune spells and support rune spells. Which of these interests you most?
I sell attack spells, healing spells, support spells and summon spells. Which of these interests you most?
For which magic level would you like to learn a spell?
Farewell.
For level 0 I have 'Find Person' and 'Light'.
For level 1 I have 'Light Healing', 'Light Magic Missile' and 'Intense Healing'.
For level 2 I have 'Antidote' and 'Poison Field'.
For level 3 I have 'Great Light', 'Heavy Magic Missile' and 'Fire Field'.
For level 4 I have 'Magic Shield'.
For level 5 I have 'Fireball' and 'Energy Field'.
For level 6 I have 'Destroy Field'.
For level 7 I have 'Fire Wave'.
For level 8 I have 'Ultimate Healing'.
For level 9 I have 'Great Fireball' and 'Firebomb'.
For level 10 I have 'Energy Beam' and 'Creature Illusion'.
For level 11 I have 'Poison Wall'.
For level 12 I have 'Explosion'.
For level 13 I have 'Fire Wall' and 'Fire Wall'.
For level 14 I have 'Great Energy Beam'.
For level 15 I have 'Invisible'.
For level 16 I have 'Summon Creature'.
For level 18 I have 'Energy Wall'.
For level 20 I have 'Energy Wave'.
For level 25 I have 'Sudden Death'.
Hmm, I have no spells for this magic level, but for many magic levels from 0 to 25.
You already know how to cast this spell.
You have to be magic level %A to learn this spell.
You need more money.
Here you are. Look in your spellbook for the pronunciation of this spell.
Then not.
